label: 复古招贴版
texture_guidance: 旧纸、网点印刷、搪瓷、木门头、微褪色油墨。
scene_prompt: RETRO PRINT POSTER. light: warm late-afternoon side light from left, soft vignette around corners, no modern studio shine. material: aged paper grain, offset print dots, enamel cup, old wooden sign, faded ink, ceramic bowl, neighborhood storefront texture. color: faded teal #4F8A8B, brick red #A6422A, aged cream #EFE0C2, dark brown #3A2418; colors should look printed, not neon. composition: structured poster grid; title block in upper 30%, one framed food/store illustration or photo-card in middle 45%, small info strip at bottom 12-16%. avoid: no futuristic UI, no glossy luxury, no random antique clutter, no saturated pop sticker collage.
design_lessons: 复古招贴需要印刷秩序和旧纸质感，不是简单加滤镜。
